revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
「[[Template:Ja Route Sign]]」の保護設定を変更しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]] ([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{ #if: {{Ja Route Sign/has SVG image|{{{1}}}}} 
| [[ファイル:Japanese National Route Sign {{padleft:{{{1}}}|4|0}}.svg|{{{width|60}}}px{{ #if: {{{thumb|}}} | {{!}}thumb }}{{ #if: {{{align|}}} | {{!}}{{{align}}} }}|{{{alt|国道{{{1}}}号標識}}}]]
| {{Ja Route Sign/Composite Image|{{{1}}}|width={{{width|60}}}|align={{{align|}}}|alt={{{alt|国道{{{1}}}号標識}}}}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
